title: Software Update - DFU - Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings
scenario: Verify DFU is blocked with a popup when charge case battery is below 5% and not plugged in, but proceeds successfully once the case is connected to a charger.
steps: 1. Ensure the charge case battery is below 5% and not plugged into power.
2. Attempt to perform a DFU (Device Firmware Update) on the headset/charge case.
4. Connect the charge case to a charger.
expected: 1. When battery is below 5% and not plugged in, attempting DFU shows a popup: "Update currently not available, please try back later".\n2. After connecting to a charger, the DFU should proceed and complete successfully.
